languages.text: {n}Идеально очерченная бровь Ювенны слегка приподнимается.{/n} "Я ожидала чего угодно, но..." {n}Оборвав себя на полуслове, она скрещивает руки на груди.{/n} "Пустое. Назови направление, и я начну трансляцию".

{n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."
languages.original_text: {n}Идеально очерченная бровь Ювенны слегка приподнимается.{/n} "Я ожидала чего угодно, но..." {n}Оборвав себя на полуслове, она скрещивает руки на груди.{/n} "Пустое. Назови направление, и я начну трансляцию".

languages.text: {n}Juvenna arquea una ceja perfectamente definida.{/n} «Estaba preparada para cualquier cosa, pero...». {n}Se interrumpe y se cruza de brazos.{/n} «No importa. Indíqueme la dirección y daré comienzo a la transmisión».
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna arquea una ceja perfectamente definida.{/n} «Estaba preparada para cualquier cosa, pero...». {n}Se interrumpe y se cruza de brazos.{/n} «No importa. Indíqueme la dirección y daré comienzo a la transmisión».

languages.text: {n}尤文娜挑起一侧修整得完美的眉毛。{/n}“我原本已经做好了一切准备，但——”{n}她突然收住话头，双臂抱在胸前。{/n}“算了。说个方位，我这就开始发指令。”
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."

traits.locale_text: {n}尤文娜挑起一侧修整得完美的眉毛。{/n}“我原本已经做好了一切准备，但——”{n}她突然收住话头，双臂抱在胸前。{/n}“算了。说个方位，我这就开始发指令。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna hausse un sourcil parfaitement dessiné.{/n} « Je m'attendais à tout, sauf à... » {n}Elle s'interrompt et croise les bras sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Peu importe. Désignez votre cible, et je transmettrai. »
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna hausse un sourcil parfaitement dessiné.{/n} « Je m'attendais à tout, sauf à... » {n}Elle s'interrompt et croise les bras sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Peu importe. Désignez votre cible, et je transmettrai. »

languages.text: {n}Juvenna, kusursuzca kavisli kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Her şeye hazırlıklıydım ama..." {n}Sözünü kesiyor ve kollarını göğsünde kavuşturuyor.{/n} "Fark etmez. Yönü söyleyin, yayına başlayayım."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna, kusursuzca kavisli kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Her şeye hazırlıklıydım ama..." {n}Sözünü kesiyor ve kollarını göğsünde kavuşturuyor.{/n} "Fark etmez. Yönü söyleyin, yayına başlayayım."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna hebt eine perfekt getrimmte Augenbraue.{/n} "Ich war auf alles vorbereitet, aber ..." {n}Sie unterbricht sich selbst und verschränkt die Arme vor ihrer Brust.{/n} "Egal. Sagt mir die Richtung, und ich beginne mit der Übertragung."
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは眉を一つ上げて言った。{/n}「どんなことにも備えていたが…」{n}、途中で言葉を止めて胸に腕を組んだ。{/n}「どうでも良い。方向を名付ければ、私は送信を開始する。」
languages.original_text: {n}Juvenna raises one perfectly defined eyebrow.{/n} "I was prepared for anything, but—" {n}cutting herself off, she crosses her arms over her chest.{/n} "No matter. Name the direction, and I'll start the transmission."
